headline: Microchip Trust Platform Expansion Highlights Security Focus And Valuation Gap
summary: Microchip Technology has expanded its Trust Platform with the TA101 TrustFLEX and TA101 TrustMANAGER secure authentication devices. The new products introduce hardware based security and cloud based key management aimed at industrial and automotive applications. The launch is designed to help manufacturers address tightening regulations such as the EU Cyber Resilience Act and ISO/SAE 21434. For investors watching NasdaqGS:MCHP, this product update sits against a mixed share price backdrop...
